dailyStatus.question: How are you feeling today?
dailyStatus.interceptor_desc: Log your energy level to tailor your experience.
dailyStatus.note_placeholder: Add an optional note about your day...
dailyStatus.success_desc: You have logged your daily status for today.
dailyStatus.error_desc: An error occurred. Please navigate to the daily status page to try again.
dailyStatus.feedback_0: Sounds like a tough day. Remember to go at your own pace <3.
dailyStatus.feedback_1: A low-energy day - be kind to yourself today.
dailyStatus.feedback_2: A so-so day - that's more than enough.
dailyStatus.feedback_3: Good spells today - lovely to hear!
dailyStatus.feedback_4: Full energy! Make the most of it today.
dailyStatus.reset_desc: Your mood for this day has been removed.

heroSection.subtitle: Chroniqo is built to reduce social isolation for the chronically ill. No stress, no demands - just support.

previewSection.title: Adapts to your day - not the other way around.
previewSection.caption: The UI automatically adapts to your energy level - colors, tone, and content.

featuresGrid.title: Built for chronics, by chronics.
featuresGrid.card_1_desc: Participate in communities at your own pace. No notifications, no time pressure - just human connection when you have the energy.
featuresGrid.card_2_desc: Share sensitive experiences safely without exposing your identity. Your story is yours.
featuresGrid.card_3_desc: Chroniqo registers your daily energy and adapts the app's visual expression, tone, and content so it always feels right.

footerSection.description: A digital sanctuary for you with chronic illness. Built with care.
footerSection.credit_3: Aarhus University Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: Chroniqo ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform. Please read this policy carefully.
privacy.p2: Chroniqo is strictly a social support tool. The platform cannot be used for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. All interactions, including AI-generated content, are for empathetic support only and do not replace professional healthcare.
privacy.p3: When you create an account and use the platform, we collect: Email address, username, optional health conditions (tags), your daily energy status, and content you share (posts and comments). To protect users from harassment, your identity remains visible to administrators even when posting anonymously in communities.
privacy.p4: We use the information to: Provide and maintain the platform, adapt the user interface (e.g., 'Low Energy Mode' based on your status), facilitate asynchronous communities, and power our session-based AI support bot. We never sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.p5: You have full control over your data. If you delete your account via settings, all your personal information, posts, comments, and daily statuses are immediately and permanently erased from our servers with no possibility of recovery.
privacy.p6: We have implemented technical security measures, including strong password hashing and secure session cookies (HttpOnly), to protect your information against unauthorized access.
privacy.p7: Chroniqo only uses strictly necessary cookies to make the system function. We use secure session cookies to keep you logged in, and a local cookie to remember your language preference. We do not use any tracking or marketing cookies (e.g., no Google Analytics).
privacy.p8: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@chroniqo.app.

publicHelp.title: Help & Getting Started
publicHelp.subtitle: Need help signing in, creating an account, or understanding the basics? This page covers the public parts of Chroniqo.
publicHelp.sign_in_desc: Use the email address you registered with, then enter your password. If you used Google during sign-up, try the Google sign-in option instead.
publicHelp.signup_desc: Choose a username, verify your email, and set a password. If you do not see the verification email, check your spam or junk folder first.
publicHelp.email_desc: Wait a minute or two, refresh your inbox, and make sure you entered the correct email address. If needed, request a new verification link from the sign-up flow.
publicHelp.trouble_1: Wrong password: use the password reset flow if you cannot remember it.
publicHelp.trouble_2: Browser issues: try refreshing the page or opening Chroniqo in another browser.
publicHelp.trouble_3: Locked out or suspended: check for any message shown on the login screen.
publicHelp.contact_desc: If the public guidance above does not solve your issue, contact support from the address shown in the app or ask someone on your care team to help you get back in.

minigames.description_tic_tac_toe: Take turns placing your mark on a 3x3 grid. Be the first to get 3 in a row.
minigames.description_connect_four: Drop pieces into a 7x6 grid. Pieces fall to the lowest open spot. First to get 4 in a row wins.
minigames.description_knucklebones: Place dice in your 3x3 grid. Matching dice in the opponent's column are destroyed. Fill your grid last - highest score wins.
minigames.rules_tic_tac_toe_2: First to get 3 in a row wins - horizontally, vertically, or diagonally
minigames.rules_tic_tac_toe_3: Draw if all cells are filled
minigames.rules_connect_four_2: First to get 4 in a row wins
minigames.rules_knucklebones_1: The die is rolled automatically by the server
minigames.rules_knucklebones_3: Your dice destroy the opponent's matching dice in the same column
minigames.rules_knucklebones_4: Score: count² x die value per group in a column
minigames.rules_knucklebones_5: Game ends when a player fills their grid
minigames.over_their_turn: It's the opponent's turn - you'll be notified when it's yours.
minigames.live_disconnect_warning: Opponent appears to be offline. Surrendering in {{seconds}}s…
minigames.challenge_notice: u/{{username}} is challenging you to this game!
minigames.pending_waiting_for_accept: Waiting for opponent to accept the challenge…
minigames.over_draw_subtitle: This game ended in a draw.

about.title: About Chroniqo
about.subtitle: A digital sanctuary built for people with chronic illness. No stress, no demands—just support when you need it.
about.mission_desc: Chroniqo exists to reduce social isolation for people living with chronic illness. We understand that managing a chronic condition means managing your energy, your good days and your difficult days. We've built a platform that adapts to you—not the other way around.
about.built_desc: Chroniqo was developed with deep understanding of what chronic illness means. Every design decision, every feature, and every interaction has been thoughtfully considered to support people living with conditions that fluctuate day to day, hour to hour.
about.no_pressure_desc: Asynchronous interactions mean you engage at your own pace. No notifications demanding your attention, no expectations to respond immediately.
about.privacy_desc: Share your authentic story safely. Anonymity is available whenever you need it, giving you control over your identity.
about.adaptive_desc: The platform adapts to your daily energy level. Colors, tone, and content shift to match how you're feeling, making Chroniqo feel right every day.
about.community_desc: Connect with others who understand. Share experiences, find comfort, and know you're not alone in this journey.
about.async_communities_desc: Participate in meaningful communities without time pressure. Read, respond, and engage whenever you have the energy.
about.daily_status_desc: Log how you're feeling each day. Your energy level influences the platform's visual appearance and content intensity.
about.personal_messaging_desc: Connect with community members directly through asynchronous conversations—respond when you're ready.
about.ai_bot_desc: Get empathetic support through our session-based AI. Remember: Chroniqo is a support tool, not medical advice.
about.important_note_desc: Chroniqo is a social support platform and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with qualified healthcare providers regarding your health. Our AI support features are designed for empathetic support only.
about.built_care_desc: Chroniqo was developed as a Bachelor project at Aarhus University, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering. Every feature has been designed with careful consideration for the lived experience of chronic illness.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Chroniqo. If you need additional support, don't hesitate to reach out.
help.faq_1_q: How do I get started with Chroniqo?
help.faq_1_a: Welcome! When you first sign up, you'll be guided through a quick onboarding process. You can set up your profile, choose your health conditions, and configure your preferences. Your daily status will help personalize your experience.
help.faq_2_q: What is the daily status and why does it matter?
help.faq_2_a: Your daily status tells Chroniqo how you're feeling energy-wise that day. You can choose from: Completely Exhausted, Low Energy, Doing Okay, Good Periods, or Full Energy. The platform uses this to adapt its appearance, colors, and content intensity to match your current capacity.
help.faq_3_a: Communities are spaces for asynchronous discussion. You can browse posts, share your own, comment on others' posts, and participate in discussions—all at your own pace. There are no notifications demanding immediate responses, and you can engage whenever you have the energy.
help.faq_4_a: Yes! You can post anonymously in communities to share sensitive experiences safely. Your anonymity is respected on the platform, though moderators can see your identity for safety and moderation purposes.
help.faq_5_a: You can send private messages to other users. Messaging is asynchronous—you can respond whenever you're ready. You can control who can message you through your privacy settings (Allow all, Friends only, or Disabled).
help.faq_6_q: How do I find communities and posts?
help.faq_6_a: Use the search feature to find communities, posts, and users. You can search by keywords, topic, or username. Search results help you discover relevant communities and discussions.
help.faq_7_a: Your personalized feed shows recent posts from communities you're a member of. The feed adapts to your daily energy level, showing different content based on how you're feeling.
help.faq_8_q: How do I set up my profile?
help.faq_8_a: Go to your profile settings to add a profile picture, bio, health conditions, and other information. You can control who sees your profile and what information is public. You can also set your messaging preferences.
help.faq_9_q: What is the AI support bot?
help.faq_9_a: Chroniqo includes an empathetic AI support bot available in your message section. It provides supportive conversations based on your sessions. Important: This is not medical advice. The AI is designed for emotional support only.
help.faq_10_a: We take your privacy seriously. We never sell your data to third parties. Your information is used solely to provide and improve Chroniqo. Read our full Privacy Policy for detailed information about data collection and usage.
help.faq_11_q: How do I change my password or email?
help.faq_11_a: Visit your account settings page. You can update your email, change your password, configure privacy settings, and manage your preferences. Make sure to save any changes.
help.faq_12_a: Yes. Visit your account settings and look for the account deletion option. Please note that this action may be permanent. Your content may remain visible in communities unless you delete individual posts.
help.faq_13_q: How do I report inappropriate content or behavior?
help.faq_13_a: If you encounter inappropriate content, harmful behavior, or violations of community guidelines, use the report feature available on posts, comments, or user profiles. Our moderation team will review reports and take appropriate action.
help.faq_14_a: Chroniqo is built with accessibility in mind. The platform supports screen readers and keyboard navigation. If you need specific accommodations or experience accessibility issues, please let us know.
help.faq_15_q: What should I do if I'm experiencing technical issues?
help.faq_15_a: Try refreshing your browser or clearing your cache. If the issue persists, try using a different browser or device. For persistent problems, please report the issue with details about what you were doing when it occurred.
help.still_need_help_desc: Chroniqo is here to support your journey. If your question isn't answered here or if you need further assistance, we encourage you to:
help.help_item_1: Check out our Privacy Policy for more information about data handling
help.help_item_2: Use the report feature to flag any issues or concerns
help.help_item_3: Explore the community forums—others may have experienced similar questions
help.help_item_4: Try the AI support bot for empathetic conversations and guidance
help.remember_desc: Chroniqo is designed to work at your pace. There's no pressure, no rush. Whether you're having a high-energy day or just doing your best to get through, this platform is built to support you exactly where you are.
